hook.summary: Fast-paced introduction of the main characters from the hit anime 'Oshi no Ko' set to the popular theme song 'Idol'.
hook.visual_action: Split-screen character reveal followed by dynamic shots of Ai Hoshino performing on stage with colorful gem effects.
hook.text_overlay: アイ CV 高橋李依
hook.voiceover_transcript: 誰もが目を奪われていく (Everyone's eyes are stolen away)

scene_flow: Character spotlight for Ai Hoshino with performance clips and voice actor credit.
Character spotlight for Aqua Hoshino showcasing different expressions and voice actor credit.
Character spotlight for Ruby Hoshino with energetic poses and voice actor credit.
Announcement of the first-ever 'Oshi no Ko' puzzle game on a bright pink background.
Final ensemble shot with the game title 'Puzzle Star' and pre-registration call to action.
on_screen_text: アイ CV 高橋李依
アクア CV 大塚剛央
ルビー CV 伊駒ゆりえ
【推しの子】初のパズルゲーム登場！
audience_proxy: Fans of the Oshi no Ko anime series who enjoy casual mobile puzzle games.
